mechanics: GALACTIC ZONE mechanics DOCUMENTED from chat: bosses spawn/defeat with an '(X/25)' rotation counter (Treesmasher 6/25, Shadowscale 5/25, Cube God 13/25, Cookie Monster 14/25) -> ~25-boss infinite rotation. 'You have extracted [82] Fuel from this mysterious object!' = FUEL gained from in-zone objects. 'You have analyzed the coin, discovering [N] Fame!' = coins -> Fame. 'Your loot drop boost has been activated!' = a loot-boost buff. Announcer channels = god names (Reaper/Demon/Ogre/Kraken/Bat/Sphinx). Event bosses also feed in: God of Reptilians, Mad Jester, Warbringer, Pentaract Tower Ultra.
uncertain: Exact per-boss attack patterns not captured (loot montage). '(X/25)' — whether 25 is a fixed session length or running tally is unclear. Some names approximate.
confidence: HIGH — Galactic boss roster (8 names incl. Cracked Core/Stonetaker/Treesmasher/Pulse/Snake Queen) + verbatim Cracked Core & Stonetaker taunts + Fuel/coin-Fame/loot-boost mechanics, all DOCUMENTED from chat. Major Phase-D3 input.
